samples.code:
def process_data(input_data):
    step1 = validate(input_data)
    step2 = transform(step1)
    step3 = enrich(step2)
    step4 = aggregate(step3)
    step5 = compute(step4)
    step6 = format_result(step5)
    step7 = cache_result(step6)
    step8 = log_operation(step7)
    step9 = send_notification(step8)
    step10 = cleanup(step9)
    return step10
samples.label: long_method
long_method

samples.code:
def generate_report(data):
    header = create_header(data)
    summary = create_summary(data)
    charts = create_charts(data)
    tables = create_tables(data)
    footnotes = create_footnotes(data)
    appendix = create_appendix(data)
    combined = merge_sections(header, summary, charts, tables, footnotes, appendix)
    styled = apply_styles(combined)
    paginated = paginate(styled)
    pdf = render_pdf(paginated)
    compressed = compress(pdf)
    uploaded = upload_to_s3(compressed)
    notification = notify_stakeholders(uploaded)
    logged = audit_log(notification)
    return logged
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def etl_pipeline(source):
    raw = extract_from_source(source)
    cleaned = remove_nulls(raw)
    deduped = remove_duplicates(cleaned)
    normalized = normalize_columns(deduped)
    enriched = enrich_with_external(normalized)
    validated = validate_schema(enriched)
    partitioned = partition_by_date(validated)
    compressed = compress_partitions(partitioned)
    loaded = load_to_warehouse(compressed)
    indexed = create_indices(loaded)
    stats = compute_statistics(indexed)
    alerted = check_anomalies(stats)
    logged = log_pipeline_run(alerted)
    return logged
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def deploy_application(config):
    validated = validate_config(config)
    built = build_artifacts(validated)
    tested = run_tests(built)
    scanned = security_scan(tested)
    packaged = create_docker_image(scanned)
    pushed = push_to_registry(packaged)
    deployed = deploy_to_k8s(pushed)
    verified = health_check(deployed)
    migrated = run_migrations(verified)
    warmed = warm_cache(migrated)
    monitored = setup_monitoring(warmed)
    notified = notify_team(monitored)
    return notified
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def process_order(order):
    validated = validate_order(order)
    inventory = check_inventory(validated)
    priced = calculate_price(inventory)
    taxed = apply_tax(priced)
    discounted = apply_discount(taxed)
    total = calculate_total(discounted)
    payment = process_payment(total)
    confirmed = confirm_order(payment)
    packed = create_packing_slip(confirmed)
    shipped = arrange_shipping(packed)
    tracked = create_tracking(shipped)
    emailed = send_confirmation(tracked)
    logged = log_order(emailed)
    return logged
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def analyze_metrics(dataset):
    loaded = load_dataset(dataset)
    cleaned = clean_missing_values(loaded)
    scaled = normalize_features(cleaned)
    correlated = compute_correlations(scaled)
    selected = select_features(correlated)
    split = train_test_split(selected)
    trained = train_model(split)
    evaluated = evaluate_model(trained)
    tuned = hyperparameter_tune(evaluated)
    validated = cross_validate(tuned)
    exported = export_model(validated)
    reported = generate_metrics_report(exported)
    return reported
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def onboard_customer(form_data):
    parsed = parse_form(form_data)
    validated = validate_fields(parsed)
    checked = check_duplicates(validated)
    scored = credit_score_check(checked)
    verified = identity_verification(scored)
    approved = approval_workflow(verified)
    created = create_account(approved)
    configured = setup_preferences(created)
    welcomed = send_welcome_email(configured)
    tutorialed = assign_tutorial(welcomed)
    tracked = track_onboarding(tutorialed)
    return tracked
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def render_page(request):
    auth = check_authentication(request)
    perms = check_permissions(auth)
    params = parse_query_params(perms)
    data = fetch_page_data(params)
    related = fetch_related_data(data)
    merged = merge_datasets(data, related)
    filtered = apply_filters(merged)
    sorted_data = apply_sorting(filtered)
    paginated = apply_pagination(sorted_data)
    serialized = serialize_response(paginated)
    cached = cache_response(serialized)
    compressed = compress_response(cached)
    logged = log_page_view(compressed)
    return logged
samples.label: long_method

samples.code:
def batch_import(file_path):
    opened = open_file(file_path)
    parsed = parse_rows(opened)
    validated = validate_rows(parsed)
    cleaned = clean_data(validated)
    mapped = map_to_schema(cleaned)
    enriched = enrich_records(mapped)
    deduped = deduplicate(enriched)
    inserted = bulk_insert(deduped)
    indexed = update_indices(inserted)
    counted = count_records(indexed)
    emailed = send_import_report(counted)
    return emailed
samples.label: long_method
